use_cases: Primary form submission trigger across web applications
Interactive button with multiple visual variants for diverse UI contexts
Icon or text button for toolbars and action areas
Accessible button with focus-visible states and keyboard navigation
Reusable button component supporting composition via Radix Slot
ai_summary: A reusable atomic Button component built with Radix UI Slot and class-variance-authority. Features 6 variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and 4 sizes (default, sm, lg, icon). Includes focus-visible ring styling, hover transitions, and disabled state handling. Supports composition pattern via asChild prop for integrating with other Radix primitives or custom components.
